headline: Senior Frontend & Fullstack Developer
summary: Building modern, high-performance websites with Sanity.io, Next.js, Astro, and Tailwind CSS. With over {yearsOfExperience} years of experience, I've worked with a variety of technologies, including Supabase, MongoDB, Cloudinary, and AWS, where I focus on scalable architecture and best practices for user experiences.
chatbotSummary: Aaron Molina is a senior full stack and Jamstack developer based in Miami, FL with over {yearsOfExperience} years of experience. He builds high-performance, content-driven websites and full stack applications with Astro, Next.js, TypeScript, and headless CMS platforms, and ships production software alongside AI agents like Claude Code. He is open to remote work across the US.
